name: enjoy-free-deals-backend
description: Backend API for EnjoyFreeDeals using Supabase server-side access.

scripts.build: npm run check:deploy && npm run build:web:public
scripts.build:web:public: npm --prefix web ci && npm --prefix web run build && node scripts/copy-web-dist-to-public.js
scripts.check:deploy: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/controllers/compatApiController.js && node --check src/controllers/telegramScraperController.js && node --check src/controllers/priceHistoryController.js && node --check src/routes/priceHistoryRoutes.js && node --check lib/telegramScraper.js && node --check lib/dealParser.js && node --check api/index.js && node --check scripts/sync-genie-loot.js
